cards.code: using System; using System.Reflection; public class Calc { public long Twice(long v)=>v*2; } object c = Activator.CreateInstance(typeof(Calc)); Console.WriteLine(typeof(Calc).InvokeMember("Twice", BindingFlags.InvokeMethod, null, c, new object[]{21L}));

cards.prompt: asm.GetType(StringBuilder по строке) + CreateInstance + InvokeMember Append(late)?
cards.code: using System; using System.Reflection; Assembly asm = typeof(string).Assembly; Type t = asm.GetType("System.Text.StringBuilder"); object sb = Activator.CreateInstance(t); t.InvokeMember("Append", BindingFlags.InvokeMethod, null, sb, new object[]{"late"}); Console.WriteLine(sb); Console.WriteLine(t.FullName);

cards.prompt: InvokeMember PrintValue с long-аргументом vs string-аргументом — какая перегрузка?
cards.code: using System; using System.Reflection; public class D { public string PrintValue(long v)=>$"long:{v}"; public string PrintValue(string v)=>$"str:{v}"; } Type t=typeof(D); object d=Activator.CreateInstance(t); Console.WriteLine(t.InvokeMember("PrintValue", BindingFlags.InvokeMethod, null, d, new object[]{42L})); Console.WriteLine(t.InvokeMember("PrintValue", BindingFlags.InvokeMethod, null, d, new object[]{"hi"}));
